detail: Scaffolded .project-state/ for project-state v2.0. Pack: agile-default. Phase preset: agile-default. Starting phase: 04-release.

Compliance Packs Wave 2 — Industry & Regulatory

v2.1 Release

detail: Scaffolded website/ from template. 12 docs promoted to published/ and regenerated as MDX.
First production deploy. 12 docs, 15 pages total.
Full project website v2: dashboard, milestones (10), blog (6 posts from scsiwyg), wiki, docs (12), team, decisions, about. 32 pages total.

title: Single maintainer — bus factor of one
Orchestrator SKILL.md contains stale v1 skill references
Zero automated tests or CI/CD pipeline
Starter packs ship without declared profiles
Hard dependency on scsiwyg API with no local fallback
Compliance pack research depth — Wave 1 and Wave 2 are aspirational
Overlapping milestone timeline for a single person — 9 milestones in 5 months
Silent error swallowing in website state and API layers
MCP tool stability and Claude Code coupling
No contributor pipeline or community infrastructure
Website state loading uses fragile relative path assumption

detail: Milestone baseline report: 10 milestones (1 complete, 9 planned), 30 deliverables, priority tiers defined.
Risk register baseline: 11 risks (3 critical, 5 high, 3 medium). All open.
Roadmap timeline baseline: 5 phases spanning Apr-Dec 2026. Critical path: M01→M02+M09→M08→M10.
Reporting matrix baseline: 3 entries, 2 surfaces (blog, website), 3 generator bindings.
Project identity baseline: project-state v2.0, open source, agile-default pack, 18 skills, 5 packs.
Published consolidated baseline reports to scsiwyg blog: milestones, risks, roadmap, reporting matrix, project identity.

Fixed scsiwyg API integration (wrong base URL). Added /risks page (11 risks with heat map). Added /reports page (5 baseline reports). Blog now pulling 7 posts from scsiwyg. Wiki pages fixed to use list endpoint.

summary: Generated milestone-tracker.csv, risk-register.csv, deliverables-tracker.csv, project-dashboard.md in tracking/
